race.comment: AMERICAN CONQUEST (1) wasn't too far away in town last time out with that effort following a dominant six length Toowoomba victory over this sprint journey two back. Will appreciate the drop back in company now and can return to winning ways. CAT CALL (11) has hit a bit of form of late with a win and two seconds from his past three starts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Should prove tough to hold out. LOVECATS (8) is a consistent commodity who is yet to miss the top-five in eight career outings and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. A must for the multiples. KIRKSVILLE (2) has placed over this track and trip and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Top-three credentials. The well-related HI TIAGO (5) (half to G3 winner Hear The Chant) next in line.
